project_alize.meta_description: Alizé is a web application focused on coastal conditions and outdoor planning. It aggregates tide and weather data into a clear interface.
project_alize.header_subtitle: Web application focused on coastal conditions and outdoor planning.
project_alize.screenshots_subtitle: Desktop and mobile views of the beaches listing screen.
project_alize.overview_1: Alizé helps users plan coastal activities by bringing key conditions into a single interface. The app aggregates tide data, weather conditions, and location context, then presents it in a way that supports quick decisions.
project_alize.overview_2: The project focuses on strong typing, clean component structure, and maintainable data fetching. The UI stays readable on mobile and desktop, with consistent spacing and predictable navigation.
project_alize.feature_1: Tide and weather data in one place.
project_alize.feature_2: Location based views and clear summaries.
project_alize.feature_3: Responsive layout and reusable UI components.
project_alize.feature_4: Structured data fetching with predictable states.
project_alize.desktop_alt: Alizé desktop interface showing beach cards with tide and location data
project_alize.mobile_alt: Alizé mobile interface showing stacked beach cards with tide and tags
project_alize.open_live_aria: Open Alizé live site in a new tab
project_alize.open_github_aria: Open Alizé source code on GitHub in a new tab

project_bandai.meta_title: Bandai Namco Internal API, Project, Tanguy Osvald
project_bandai.meta_description: Internal API project developed during an internship, focused on backend architecture, data modeling, validation, and reliability. Details are confidential.
project_bandai.header_subtitle: Internal backend project developed during a professional internship.
project_bandai.overview_1: This project was built during an internship and involved building and maintaining an internal API. The API exposed structured endpoints consumed by internal tools and workflows.
project_bandai.overview_2: The work focused on backend architecture, data modeling, validation, documentation, and reliability, with constraints typical of a professional environment. Source code and detailed specifications are not public due to confidentiality.
project_bandai.evaluate_3: Documentation quality and team workflow alignment.
project_bandai.no_links: No public demo and no public repository, due to confidentiality.

project_climatserv.meta_description: ClimatServ 17 is a production website for a heating and climate services company, built with clear service pages, accessibility basics, and SEO focused routing.
project_climatserv.header_subtitle: Professional website for a heating and climate services company.
project_climatserv.screenshots_subtitle: Desktop and mobile views of the home page layout and content structure.
project_climatserv.overview_1: ClimatServ 17 is a production site built to present services clearly and convert visits into contact requests. The work focuses on readable navigation, semantic structure, and a responsive layout for mobile and desktop.
project_climatserv.overview_2: Next.js routing supports SEO friendly pages and clean internal linking. A PostgreSQL and Prisma backend was implemented during development, then dropped since the client scope did not require a database.
project_climatserv.feature_1: Service pages structured for search intent and easy scanning.
project_climatserv.feature_2: Responsive sections built for real client content updates.
project_climatserv.feature_3: Accessible form labels, focus states, and clear calls to action.
project_climatserv.feature_4: SEO friendly routing, headings, and internal linking.
project_climatserv.feature_5: API routes and database layer prototyped during development.
project_climatserv.tech_note: Database and Prisma were developed during the build, then removed since the final scope did not need it.
project_climatserv.desktop_alt: ClimatServ 17 desktop interface showing the main layout and service sections
project_climatserv.mobile_alt: ClimatServ 17 mobile interface showing the responsive layout and service blocks
project_climatserv.open_live_aria: Open ClimatServ 17 live site in a new tab

project_portfolio.meta_description: This portfolio is a custom-built React application showcasing projects, skills, and contact. Designed and developed from scratch with a focus on accessibility, performance, and a unique visual identity.
project_portfolio.header_subtitle: You are looking at it. A custom React application built from scratch to showcase projects, skills, and a contact form.
project_portfolio.overview_1: This portfolio started from a blank Vite project. Every component was written by hand, with no template or theme applied on top. The goal was to produce something that felt personal and intentional rather than generic.
project_portfolio.overview_2: The design draws from a dark medieval aesthetic with muted purples, warm accent tones, and ornate CSS decorations paired with modern layout techniques for a result that stands out while staying readable and accessible.
project_portfolio.feature_1: Parallax background layers tied to scroll position.
project_portfolio.feature_2: Active section detection via IntersectionObserver logic.
project_portfolio.feature_3: Skill bubbles with floating animation and reduced-motion support.
project_portfolio.feature_4: Contact form with honeypot field, throttle guard, and Netlify Forms backend.
project_portfolio.feature_5: Hidden console quest with a secret reward panel.
project_portfolio.feature_6: Full SEO setup: Open Graph, Twitter Card, JSON-LD, canonical URLs.
project_portfolio.feature_7: Accessible navigation with skip-to-content link, aria labels, and keyboard support.
project_portfolio.feature_8: Custom 404 page with route-aware redirect handling.
project_portfolio.feature_9: Fully bilingual site (FR / EN) with URL prefix routing and persisted language switching.
project_portfolio.i18n_1: The site is available in French and English through URL prefixes (/fr/... and /en/...). The language is read from the route path, persisted in localStorage, and applied dynamically via react-i18next. A LangLayout component intercepts the route parameter, validates the language, and syncs the i18n instance without a page reload.
project_portfolio.i18n_2: A toggle button with SVG flag icons (country-flag-icons) in the header lets users switch languages while staying on the current page. The root redirect reads localStorage to send returning visitors straight to their last used language.
project_portfolio.i18n_3: Each page includes hreflang tags in the Helmet and a lang attribute on the html element for SEO. The sitemap.xml was updated with FR and EN entries for every route, including the xhtml:link alternate links.
project_portfolio.open_live_aria: Open portfolio live site in a new tab
project_portfolio.open_github_aria: Open portfolio source code on GitHub in a new tab

project_sigilai.meta_description: SigilAI is a fullstack personal knowledge management application with a structured markdown journal, a research watchlist, and an AI layer that lets users query their own content in natural language.
project_sigilai.header_subtitle: Fullstack personal knowledge management application with an AI layer for natural language queries over your own content.
project_sigilai.overview_1: SigilAI is a solo project covering the full software development lifecycle: architecture design, technical specification, and implementation. The application centers on two core modules : a structured markdown journal and a research watchlist with an AI layer running across both.
project_sigilai.overview_2: Users can query their own content in natural language. An optional Git connector enriches the context with tagged commit history, making SigilAI a unified workspace for both writing and development reflection.
project_sigilai.overview_3: The project was designed from scratch over multiple specification iterations (v1.0 to v1.7), covering database schema (ERD), GitHub project planning with milestones, CI workflows, branching strategy, Conventional Commits, and production readiness.
project_sigilai.feature_1: Structured markdown journal with auto-save and file attachment support.
project_sigilai.feature_2: Research watchlist module for tracking external sources.
project_sigilai.feature_3: Natural language queries over personal content via an AI layer.
project_sigilai.feature_4: Optional Git connector enriching AI context with commit history.
project_sigilai.feature_5: Dual LLM adapter architecture: Ollama locally, Claude API in production.
project_sigilai.feature_6: Switchable AI provider via a single config property, no code changes needed.
project_sigilai.feature_7: JWT auth with in-memory access token and HttpOnly cookie refresh token rotation.
project_sigilai.feature_8: Rate limiting with Bucket4j, structured logging with Logback, and Spring Actuator health endpoint.
project_sigilai.feature_9: Waitlist system and LLM cost management for production readiness.
project_sigilai.feature_10: Daily pg_dump backup with rsync for file attachments and a documented restore procedure.
project_sigilai.arch_1_desc: <0>LlmPort</0> interface with <1>OllamaLlmAdapter</1> and <2>ClaudeApiAdapter</2>, switchable via Spring <3>@ConditionalOnProperty</3>.
project_sigilai.arch_2_desc: Spring MVC <0>DeferredResult</0> with a dedicated <1>ThreadPoolTaskExecutor</1>, freeing Tomcat threads during LLM calls.
project_sigilai.arch_3_desc: Axios interceptor on the frontend, React Query retry policies, and React Error Boundaries.
project_sigilai.arch_4_desc: under <0>/api/v1/</0> with MapStruct for DTO mapping and Flyway for schema migrations.
project_sigilai.open_github_aria: Open SigilAI source code on GitHub in a new tab
project_sigilai.no_demo: Live demo not yet available. Currently in active development

privacy.meta_description: Privacy policy for the portfolio website of Tanguy Osvald.
privacy.og_description: How this website handles personal data submitted through the contact form.
privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: This page explains what data you share through the contact form, why it is processed, and how you can request deletion.
privacy.collection_text: This website collects personal data only through the contact form. The data includes your name, your email address, and the content of your message.
privacy.purpose_text: Your data is used only to reply to your message and follow up on your request. No marketing emails are sent. Your data is not sold and is not shared with third parties.
privacy.storage_text: Messages are transmitted through server side processing and delivered through Gmail SMTP. Data is kept only for the time needed to handle the conversation and any related follow ups.
privacy.rights_text: You can request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data. To do so, use the contact form on this website and mention your request clearly in the message.
privacy.cookies_text: This website does not use tracking cookies, analytics tools, or advertising cookies.
privacy.summary_use: Use, reply to your inquiry only.
privacy.summary_rights: Rights, request deletion through the contact form.
